mapper.insert: insert into review (reservation_idx, content, star_rating) values (#{reservationIdx}, #{content}, #{starRating})
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET content = #{content}, star_rating = #{starRating} WHERE idx = #{idx}
mapper.select: SELECT rv.idx, rv.content, rv.star_rating, a.nickname, c.model_name, c.corporation, c.model_year, rv.reservation_idx FROM review rv JOIN reservation r ON rv.reservation_idx = r.idx JOIN rental_offer ro ON r.rental_offer_idx = ro.idx JOIN car c ON ro.car_idx = c.idx JOIN account a ON r.account_id = a.id WHERE r.account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY rv.idx DESC

select account.nickname, review.* from review join reservation on review.reservation_idx = reservation.idx join account on reservation.account_id = account.id where reservation.rental_offer_idx = #{rentalOfferIdx}
